# init(_:rounded:)

**Initializer**

Convert `CGSize` to [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/CVImageSize] using the given rounding rule.

## Declaration

```swift
init(_ size: CGSize, rounded rule: FloatingPointRoundingRule = .down)
```

## Discussion

The same rounding rule is applied to both height and width.
